single_responsibility: Extract structured profile data from each competitor site

required.candidate_competitors: array<{name, url, niche, confidence_score}> — from discovery-engine

output.competitor_profiles: array<{slug: string, name: string, url: string, niche: string, services: array<string>, contact: {email?, phone?, address?}, socials: {instagram?, linkedin?, facebook?}, positioning_summary: string}>
output.index_entries: array<{slug, url, niche, last_scraped: null, sync_enabled: true, status: 'active'}>

description: Specialized subagent for profile builder tasks within the department field context.
